examples: The next time he spoke, he used a more conciliatory tone.
This is clearly a conciliatory gesture towards his wife, Cherie, who has not seen as much of him as she might have hoped and he admits it.
This conciliatory tone was in striking contrast to Mr Arzalluz's sometimes irascible and always fiery language.
There is also increasing speculation that the IRA's traditional Easter statement may be conciliatory in tone.
